en: The word of the LORD came to me, saying,
zh: 耶和華的話臨到我，說：

en: "Go and proclaim in the hearing of Jerusalem, Thus says the LORD, "I remember the devotion of your youth, your love as a bride, how you followed me in the wilderness, in a land not sown.
zh: “你去在耶路撒冷人的耳中呼叫，說：‘耶和華這樣說： 你年輕時的恩愛， 新婚時的愛情， 你怎樣在曠野、 在未曾耕種之地跟從我， 我都記得。

en: Israel was holy to the LORD, the firstfruits of his harvest. All who ate of it incurred guilt; disaster came upon them, declares the LORD."
zh: 那時，以色列歸耶和華為聖， 作他初熟的土產。 吞吃她的，都算為有罪， 災禍必臨到他們。’” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Hear the word of the LORD, O house of Jacob, and all the clans of the house of Israel.
zh: 雅各家啊！以色列家的各族啊！你們要聽耶和華的話。

en: Thus says the LORD: "What wrong did your fathers find in me that they went far from me, and went after worthlessness, and became worthless?
zh: 耶和華這樣說： “你們列祖在我身上究竟發現了甚麼不義， 使他們遠離我， 隨從虛無的偶像， 自己也成了虛妄呢？

en: They did not say, 'Where is the LORD who brought us up from the land of Egypt, who led us in the wilderness, in a land of deserts and pits, in a land of drought and deep darkness, in a land that none passes through, where no man dwells?'
zh: 他們也不問： ‘那領我們從埃及地上來， 引導我們走過曠野， 走過荒漠有深坑之地、 乾旱死蔭之地、 無人經過、無人居住之地的耶和華在哪裡呢？’

en: And I brought you into a plentiful land to enjoy its fruits and its good things. But when you came in, you defiled my land and made my heritage an abomination.
zh: 我領你們進入這肥美之地， 得吃其中的果子和美物； 可是你們一進來，就玷污了我的地； 你們使我的產業成為可憎惡的。

en: The priests did not say, 'Where is the LORD?' Those who handle the law did not know me; the shepherds transgressed against me; the prophets prophesied by Baal and went after things that do not profit.
zh: 眾祭司都不問：‘耶和華在哪裡？’ 律法師不認識我， 官長悖逆我， 先知奉巴力的名說預言， 跟從那無益的偶像。

en: "Therefore I still contend with you, declares the LORD, and with your children's children I will contend.
zh: 因此，我要再跟你們爭辯， 也要跟你們的子孫爭辯。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: For cross to the coasts of Cyprus and see, or send to Kedar and examine with care; see if there has been such a thing.
zh: “你們儘管過到基提海島察看， 派人去基達仔細查考， 看看曾有這樣的事沒有。

en: Has a nation changed its gods, even though they are no gods? But my people have changed their glory for that which does not profit.
zh: 有哪一國把自己的神換掉呢？ 其實那些並不是神。 我的子民竟把他們的榮耀， 換了無益的偶像。

en: Be appalled, O heavens, at this; be shocked, be utterly desolate, declares the LORD,
zh: 諸天哪！你們要因此震驚， 要大大戰慄，極其淒涼。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: for my people have committed two evils: they have forsaken me, the fountain of living waters, and hewed out cisterns for themselves, broken cisterns that can hold no water.
zh: “因為我的子民作了兩件惡事， 就是離棄了我這活水的泉源， 為自己鑿了池子， 是破裂不能存水的池子。

en: "Is Israel a slave? Is he a homeborn servant? Why then has he become a prey?
zh: “以色列豈是奴隸，或是在家中生的奴僕呢？ 為甚麼竟成了掠物呢？

en: The lions have roared against him; they have roared loudly. They have made his land a waste; his cities are in ruins, without inhabitant.
zh: 幼獅都向他咆哮， 大聲吼叫， 使他的地荒涼， 城中破毀，無人居住。

en: Moreover, the men of Memphis and Tahpanhes have shaved the crown of your head.
zh: 挪弗人和答比匿人 也剃光了你的頭頂。

en: Have you not brought this upon yourself by forsaking the LORD your God, when he led you in the way?
zh: 你這不是自作自受嗎？ 耶和華你的 神在路上引導你時， 你卻離棄了他。

en: And now what do you gain by going to Egypt to drink the waters of the Nile? Or what do you gain by going to Assyria to drink the waters of the Euphrates?
zh: 現在，你為甚麼要到埃及去， 喝西曷的水呢？ 你為甚麼要到亞述去， 喝幼發拉底河的水呢？

en: Your evil will chastise you, and your apostasy will reprove you. Know and see that it is evil and bitter for you to forsake the LORD your God; the fear of me is not in you, declares the Lord GOD of hosts.
zh: 你自己的罪惡要懲罰你， 你背道的事必責備你。 你當知道，也要明白， 離棄耶和華你的 神， 沒有畏懼我的心， 是邪惡的，是痛苦的。” 這是主萬軍之耶和華的宣告。

en: "For long ago I broke your yoke and burst your bonds; but you said, 'I will not serve.' yes, on every high hill and under every green tree you bowed down like a whore.
zh: “你從古時就折斷了自己的軛， 解開了自己的繩索， 說：‘我不事奉你了。’ 你在每個高岡上， 在每棵繁茂樹下， 蹲伏行淫。

en: Yet I planted you a choice vine, wholly of pure seed. How then have you turned degenerate and become a wild vine?
zh: 我栽你時原是上等的葡萄樹， 是絕對純種的； 你怎麼在我面前變為壞枝子， 成了野葡萄呢？

en: Though you wash yourself with lye and use much soap, the stain of your guilt is still before me, declares the Lord GOD.
zh: 你雖然用鹼洗滌， 多加肥皂， 你罪孽的污漬仍留在我面前。” 這是主耶和華的宣告。

en: How can you say, 'I am not unclean, I have not gone after the Baals'? Look at your way in the valley; know what you have done- a restless young camel running here and there,
zh: “你怎麼能說：‘我沒有玷污自己， 未曾跟從過巴力’呢？ 看看你在谷中的行徑， 想想你所作過的！ 簡直像快捷的小雌駝，在路上亂闖；

en: a wild donkey used to the wilderness, in her heat sniffing the wind! Who can restrain her lust? None who seek her need weary themselves; in her month they will find her.
zh: 又像慣在曠野的野驢， 慾心一起就喘氣， 牠春情發動，誰能抑制牠呢？ 尋找牠的都不必費力， 在牠的交配期間，必能找到牠。

en: Keep your feet from going unshod and your throat from thirst. But you said, 'It is hopeless, for I have loved foreigners, and after them I will go.'
zh: 不要使你的腳赤露， 你的喉嚨乾渴！ 你卻說：‘沒用的！ 因為我愛外族人的神， 我要跟從他們！’

en: "As a thief is shamed when caught, so the house of Israel shall be shamed: they, their kings, their officials, their priests, and their prophets,
zh: “賊被捉拿時怎樣羞愧， 以色列家和他們的君王、領袖、 祭司和先知， 也都怎樣羞愧。

en: who say to a tree, 'You are my father,' and to a stone, 'You gave me birth.' For they have turned their back to me, and not their face. But in the time of their trouble they say, 'Arise and save us!'
zh: 他們對木頭說：‘你是我爸爸’； 對石頭說：‘你是生我的’。 他們以背向我， 不以臉向我； 然而遭遇患難時卻說： ‘起來，救救我們吧！’

en: But where are your gods that you made for yourself? Let them arise, if they can save you, in your time of trouble; for as many as your cities are your gods, O Judah.
zh: 你為自己所做的神在哪裡？ 你遭遇患難時， 如果他們能救你，就讓他們起來吧！ 猶大啊！你的城有多少， 你的神也有多少！

en: "Why do you contend with me? You have all transgressed against me, declares the LORD.
zh: 你們為甚麼跟我爭辯呢？ 你們都悖逆了我！” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: In vain have I struck your children; they took no correction; your own sword devoured your prophets like a ravening lion.
zh: “我責打你們的兒女也是沒用， 因為他們不受管教。 你們的刀劍， 像滅命的獅子吞噬你們的先知。

en: And you, O generation, behold the word of the LORD. Have I been a wilderness to Israel, or a land of thick darkness? Why then do my people say, 'We are free, we will come no more to you'?
zh: 這世代的人哪！你們要注意耶和華的話： ‘對以色列人來說，難道我是曠野， 或是黑暗的地方？ 我的子民為甚麼說：我們自由了， 不再到你那裡去了？

en: Can a virgin forget her ornaments, or a bride her attire? Yet my people have forgotten me days without number.
zh: 少女能忘記她的飾物嗎？ 新婦能忘記她的華帶嗎？ 我的子民卻忘記了我， 這些日子無法數算。

en: "How well you direct your course to seek love! So that even to wicked women you have taught your ways.
zh: 你多麼通曉門路， 去尋求愛情！ 就連壞女人， 你也可以把門路指教她們。

en: Also on your skirts is found the lifeblood of the guiltless poor; you did not find them breaking in. Yet in spite of all these things
zh: 在你衣襟上又發現無辜窮人的血， 並且你不是發現他們在挖窟窿時殺他們的。 雖然這樣，

en: you say, 'I am innocent; surely his anger has turned from me.' Behold, I will bring you to judgment for saying, 'I have not sinned.'
zh: 你還說：我是無辜的， 他的怒氣必已離開我。 看哪！我要審判你， 因為你曾說：我沒有犯罪！

en: How much you go about, changing your way! You shall be put to shame by Egypt as you were put to shame by Assyria.
zh: 你為甚麼要東奔西跑， 改變你的路向呢？ 你必因埃及蒙羞， 像你從前因亞述受辱一樣。

en: From it too you will come away with your hands on your head, for the LORD has rejected those in whom you trust, and you will not prosper by them.
zh: 你必雙手抱頭從埃及出來， 因為耶和華棄絕了你所倚靠的， 你靠他們必不能成功。’”
